qwen3:8b.notes: Default fast general model for Chinese/English summaries, extraction, archive writing, and bounded candidate work.

deepseek-r1:8b.notes: Use for bounded reasoning, candidate test cases, and small bug hypothesis lists. Do not use for final risk review.

gemma3:12b.notes: Use when the local task involves image-oriented or multimodal candidate work, if supported by the local flow.

qwen3:14b.notes: Use when quality matters more than speed and the task is still bounded.

deepseek-r1:14b.notes: Use for harder bounded reasoning if speed is less important.
